title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 163.012 - Average daily attendance and membership, how determined
text:
163.012.  Average daily attendance and membership, how determined. — For state aid and all other school purposes, membership and average daily attendance shall be determined on the basis of full-time equivalence in the same manner as specified for part-time students in section 163.011.
(L. 1984 H.B. 1456 & 1197)
